about.shortBio: I build software, tinker with electronics, and run my own homelab.
about.longBio: Software engineer specializing in web and mobile application development. I also work with smartphones (diagnostics and hardware builds), microcontrollers, and maintaining server infrastructure in my home homelab.

projects.title: T-Learning
projects.longDescription: Educational platform with a workspace system, invitations, and OAuth authorization.

projects.title: Rohan
projects.longDescription: Advanced task list (quests) with three custom themes, gamification and offline mode.

projects.title: Questions
projects.longDescription: Web application for engineering exam preparation with weighted question selection, AI answer evaluation (Google Gemini), multi-session support and progress statistics.

projects.title: Product-Catalogue
projects.description: Fullstack product catalogue with cart and payments.
projects.longDescription: Product catalogue with cart, orders, and PayPal sandbox payment.

projects.title: DOCX-App
projects.longDescription: Desktop tool for bulk generation of certificates and .docx documents.

projects.title: EchoNotes
projects.description: PWA for speech recognition and synthesis.
projects.longDescription: Simple PWA using in-browser speech recognition and synthesis.

projects.title: Homelab
projects.longDescription: My own server infrastructure (NixOS) hosting portfolio projects. Public access via Cloudflare Tunnel, reverse proxy Caddy routing subdomains to services in Docker Compose.

timeline.title: Web Developer Intern
timeline.subtitle: Web agency (remote)
